name: Chief Executives and Directors
description: Plan, organize, direct, coordinate and control general operations of organizations and departments. Make strategic decisions and oversee all business functions.
ai_exposure_reasoning: High exposure: Largely digital work involving strategic planning, email, reports, video calls. AI assists with analysis and decision-making.

name: General Managers and Managers nec
description: Oversee general management of companies, departments or major sections. Manage resources, staff, and operations.
ai_exposure_reasoning: High exposure: Mix of digital (reports, email, planning) and human interaction. AI can handle scheduling, data analysis, and documentation.

name: Finance Managers
description: Manage accounting, finance and investment functions. Create financial strategy and oversee budgets.
ai_exposure_reasoning: High exposure: Mostly screen-based work - spreadsheets, financial analysis, reporting. AI can automate data processing and forecasting.

name: Human Resources Managers
description: Plan and coordinate human resources activities, recruitment, training, and employee relations.
ai_exposure_reasoning: High exposure: Digital tools for recruitment, training management, analytics. Requires human judgment but increasingly AI-assisted.

name: Sales and Marketing Managers
description: Plan and direct sales, marketing and related operations. Set strategies to maximize market share.
ai_exposure_reasoning: High exposure: Digital marketing tools, analytics, email campaigns. AI generates content, optimizes campaigns, analyzes customer data.

name: Operations and Project Managers
description: Plan and coordinate operational or project activities. Manage timelines, budgets, resources and teams.
ai_exposure_reasoning: High exposure: Project management software, digital planning, reporting. AI assists with scheduling, risk analysis, and resource allocation.

name: Software and ICT Professionals
description: Design, develop, test and maintain software systems, databases, networks. Manage IT infrastructure and cybersecurity.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Very high exposure: Entirely screen-based. AI co-pilots assist with coding, testing, debugging. Some creative architecture work remains.

name: Accountants
description: Prepare, examine and verify financial accounts and statements. Ensure legal and regulatory compliance.
ai_exposure_reasoning: High exposure: Mostly digital spreadsheets and accounting software. Routine reconciliation and data entry highly automatable.

name: Engineers
description: Design, develop and improve engineering products, structures, processes and systems. Conduct technical analysis.
ai_exposure_reasoning: High exposure: CAD software, simulations, analysis - all digital. AI assists with design optimization, calculations, and documentation.

name: Architects and Surveyors
description: Design buildings and structures. Conduct land surveys and prepare architectural drawings.
ai_exposure_reasoning: High exposure: Digital design tools, CAD, visualization. Requires spatial reasoning and client interaction; AI assists with drawings.

name: Scientists
description: Conduct research in physical, biological or environmental sciences. Develop new technologies and processes.
ai_exposure_reasoning: High exposure: Data analysis, literature review, modeling - mostly digital. AI assists with analysis and hypothesis generation.

name: Teachers
description: Teach students from early childhood through tertiary levels. Develop curriculum and assess learning outcomes.
ai_exposure_reasoning: High exposure: Digital lesson planning, grading, communication. AI can generate content, provide personalized instruction support. Human relationship essential.

name: Nurses and Nursing Professionals
description: Provide nursing care and health services. Work in hospitals, clinics, community and aged care settings.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Moderate exposure: Physical care essential but increasing digital work (patient records, monitoring). AI assists with diagnostics and charting.

name: Doctors and Physicians
description: Diagnose and treat diseases. Perform medical procedures and prescribe medications.
ai_exposure_reasoning: High exposure: Diagnosis increasingly supported by AI imaging analysis and data. Procedures remain physical; patient interaction critical.

name: Dentists
description: Provide dental care and treatment. Diagnose and treat dental conditions and perform procedures.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Moderate exposure: Physical procedures require hands-on work. Digital tools for imaging and planning; AI assists with diagnosis.

name: Lawyers and Legal Professionals
description: Provide legal advice, represent clients in court, draft legal documents and ensure regulatory compliance.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Very high exposure: Document drafting, contract review, legal research highly automatable by AI. Client relations and courtroom work remain.

name: Psychologists and Counsellors
description: Assess and treat mental health issues. Provide counselling and psychological support services.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Moderate exposure: Human relationship central to work. AI assists with note-taking, data analysis, treatment planning. Cannot replace empathy.

name: Marketing and Communications Specialists
description: Develop marketing strategies, content, and campaigns. Manage brand communications and public relations.
ai_exposure_reasoning: High exposure: Content creation, social media, analytics - increasingly digital and AI-assisted. AI generates copy, designs, analyzes trends.

name: Data Analysts and Scientists
description: Collect, analyze and interpret data. Create models and insights to inform business decisions.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Very high exposure: Almost entirely screen-based and digital. AI assists with model building, pattern detection, visualization. Insight generation remains.

name: Designers and Creatives
description: Create visual designs, user experiences, graphics and creative content for various media.
ai_exposure_reasoning: High exposure: Digital design tools, AI image generation. Creative direction and strategy remain human; execution increasingly AI-assisted.

name: Electrical Technicians
description: Install, maintain and repair electrical systems and equipment in buildings and infrastructure.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Low exposure: Requires in-person, hands-on work. Physical problem-solving in real environments. Some digital troubleshooting tools.

name: Mechanical Technicians
description: Install, maintain and repair mechanical equipment, machinery and systems.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Low exposure: Physical hands-on maintenance work. Some digital diagnostics but mostly hands-on troubleshooting.

name: IT Support Technicians
description: Provide technical support for IT systems, networks, hardware and software. Troubleshoot issues and maintain systems.
ai_exposure_reasoning: High exposure: Largely screen-based troubleshooting and support. AI chatbots and automated diagnostics handle routine issues.

name: Motor Mechanics
description: Repair and maintain motor vehicles. Diagnose mechanical faults and replace components.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Low exposure: Primarily hands-on physical work. Digital diagnostics assist but real-world mechanical skills essential.

name: Electricians
description: Install, maintain and repair electrical systems. Ensure compliance with safety standards and regulations.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Low exposure: Physically demanding, on-site work. Safety-critical decisions require human judgment and in-person presence.

name: Plumbers
description: Install, maintain and repair plumbing systems. Fix leaks and maintain water supply and drainage.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Low exposure: Hands-on physical work in unpredictable environments. Site-specific problem-solving. Minimal digital component.

name: Carpenters
description: Construct, erect and repair wooden structures and components. Work on buildings, furniture and frameworks.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Low exposure: Mostly hands-on construction work. Some digital design tools used; primarily physical skill-based.

name: Welders and Metalworkers
description: Weld, bend, shape and form metal components. Construct and repair metal structures.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Low exposure: Highly physical, skilled manual work. AI cannot replicate welding skills. Minimal digital tasks.

name: HVAC Technicians
description: Install, maintain and repair heating, ventilation and air conditioning systems.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Low exposure: Physical installation and repair work. Some digital diagnostics; real-world problem-solving essential.

name: Builders and Site Supervisors
description: Supervise construction sites and coordinate building operations. Ensure safety and quality standards.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Moderate exposure: Mix of on-site coordination and digital planning tools. Project management increasingly digital; human presence essential.

name: Childcare Workers
description: Provide care and education for young children in childcare settings. Supervise and facilitate development activities.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Low exposure: Requires constant in-person presence and physical interaction. Human relationship and supervision critical. AI cannot replace presence.

name: Aged Care Workers
description: Provide care and support to elderly people in residential and community settings. Assist with daily activities.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Low exposure: Physical, hands-on care required. Human compassion and presence essential. Mostly in-person work.

name: Social Workers
description: Support vulnerable people and families. Connect clients with social services and resources.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Moderate exposure: Human relationship central but increasing digital case management. AI assists with resource matching and documentation.

name: Disability Support Workers
description: Provide support and care to people with disabilities. Assist with daily living and work activities.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Low exposure: Physical in-person support essential. Direct human care and interaction cannot be automated.

name: Security Guards
description: Protect people, property and premises. Monitor security, respond to incidents and enforce access control.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Moderate exposure: Mix of monitoring (digital systems, AI surveillance) and physical presence. Human judgment required for incidents.

name: Police Officers
description: Maintain law and order. Respond to incidents, investigate crimes and enforce regulations.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Moderate exposure: Increasing digital tools for crime analysis and reporting. Physical presence and judgment essential for operations.

name: Firefighters
description: Respond to fire and emergency incidents. Conduct rescue operations and prevent fires.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Minimal exposure: Extremely dangerous, unpredictable physical work. Human presence and split-second decision-making non-negotiable.

name: Healthcare Assistants
description: Assist nurses and healthcare professionals. Support patients with daily activities and care tasks.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Low exposure: Primarily hands-on physical patient care. In-person presence required. Some digital charting; automation limited.

name: Administrative Assistants
description: Provide administrative support, manage correspondence, handle scheduling and coordinate office operations.
ai_exposure_reasoning: High exposure: Largely screen-based office work. Email, scheduling, document management highly automatable by AI. Judgment role shrinking.

name: Secretaries and Receptionist
description: Greet visitors, answer phones, handle correspondence and maintain records.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Very high exposure: Phone systems, email, scheduling mostly automatable. AI chatbots handle routine calls. Role under threat.

name: Bookkeepers
description: Record financial transactions, maintain accounts and ensure accurate financial records.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Very high exposure: Data entry and transaction recording highly automatable. Automation tools already replacing manual work.

name: Customer Service Officers
description: Respond to customer inquiries, provide support and resolve issues via phone, email or chat.
ai_exposure_reasoning: High exposure: Much work done digitally. AI chatbots handle routine inquiries. Human agents remain for complex issues and relationship building.

name: Data Entry Operators
description: Enter data into computer systems, maintain databases and ensure accuracy of records.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Maximum exposure: Routine digital task. OCR, RPA, and AI can handle data entry. Role largely redundant.

name: Retail Salespersons
description: Sell goods and assist customers in retail environments. Handle transactions and provide product information.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Moderate exposure: Digital POS systems and e-commerce growing. Physical presence and personal interaction still valued. Threatened by online shopping.

name: Sales Representatives
description: Sell products and services to businesses or individuals. Develop customer relationships and meet targets.
ai_exposure_reasoning: High exposure: Digital tools, CRM, email increasingly central. Lead generation and nurturing becoming AI-driven. Relationship building remains.

name: Estate Agents and Real Estate Agents
description: Market properties, conduct viewings, negotiate sales and manage property transactions.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Moderate exposure: Virtual tours, online listings, pricing AI emerging. Viewings and negotiation remain human-dependent. Transitioning.

name: General Labourers
description: Perform general manual labour tasks on construction sites, factories or other worksites. Handle materials and equipment.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Minimal exposure: Purely physical, unpredictable work. Some robotic automation emerging but largely human effort required.

name: Farm Workers
description: Perform manual work on farms. Plant and harvest crops, maintain equipment and care for livestock.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Low exposure: Mostly physical farm work. Precision agriculture tools and drones emerging but core work remains hands-on.

name: Cleaners
description: Clean residential and commercial premises. Maintain hygiene standards and dispose of waste.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Minimal exposure: Purely physical cleaning work. Robots emerging but still require human oversight. Unpredictable environments.

name: Warehouse Workers
description: Store, retrieve and organize goods in warehouses. Pack and prepare shipments for dispatch.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Low exposure: Warehouse automation and robotics rising but picking/packing remain labor-intensive. Mix of physical and digital tools.

name: Chefs and Cooks
description: Prepare meals and dishes in kitchens and restaurants. Plan menus and manage kitchen operations.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Low exposure: Creative and physical cooking work. AI assists with recipe development and menu planning; execution remains human skill-based.

name: Machine Operators
description: Operate industrial machinery and equipment. Monitor production and maintain machinery.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Moderate exposure: Increasingly automated machinery with less human operation needed. Maintenance and troubleshooting remain. Role declining.

name: Heavy Equipment Operators
description: Operate excavators, loaders, graders and other heavy equipment. Perform earthmoving and construction tasks.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Low exposure: Skilled hands-on equipment operation. Autonomous equipment emerging but requires human oversight. Physical skill essential.

name: Truck Drivers and Delivery Drivers
description: Transport goods and materials by vehicle. Load and unload cargo and maintain vehicle safety.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Moderate exposure: Autonomous vehicles emerging but human drivers still essential. Increasing digital route planning and communication tools.

name: Bus Drivers and Taxi Drivers
description: Transport passengers by bus or taxi. Ensure passenger safety and maintain vehicle condition.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Moderate exposure: Autonomous vehicles will disrupt. Current role involves customer service and safety. Facing long-term automation threat.

name: Gardeners and Landscapers
description: Design and maintain gardens and outdoor spaces. Plant vegetation, maintain lawns and manage landscapes.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Low exposure: Mostly physical outdoor work. Creative design element; execution highly manual. Robotic maintenance emerging.

name: Hospitality Workers
description: Work in hotels, restaurants and cafes. Provide customer service and maintain premises.
ai_exposure_reasoning: Low exposure: Physical work and personal interaction essential. Some digital tools for booking and communication; face-to-face service core.
